description: Twilio WhatsApp Content template metadata for the Patient Retention Engine. Runtime variables are mapped into Twilio ContentVariables.

templates.trigger: Patient completes QR intake and is added to the doctor queue
templates.message:
Hi {{patient_name}}, a very warm welcome to {{clinic_name}}.

We're glad you chose our clinic today. {{doctor_name}} will be with you shortly.

Your details are safe with {{clinic_name}}, and we'll send your prescription and care updates to this number when they're ready.

Please keep this number handy. See you inside!
templates.notes: Warm clinic-owned first welcome after QR intake. Doctor name should be passed as a display name such as Dr. Mehta, not prefixed again in the template. No patient reply flow is implied.

templates.message: Hi {{hospital_name}}, your onboarding for {{facility_type}} is complete. We have registered {{doctor_name}} as the primary contact and {{city}} as the facility location. Reply CONFIRM if this is correct or EDIT if you need changes.
templates.notes: Admin/ops card for newly boarded hospitals. Matches existing Twilio hospital_onboarding card: {{1}} hospital, {{2}} facility type, {{3}} doctor/contact, {{4}} city.

templates.trigger: Doctor issues prescription PDF after consultation
templates.notes: Prescription delivery card. Edge function maps {{1}} patient, {{2}} doctor, {{3}} PDF URL, {{4}} follow-up detail.

templates.message:
Good morning {{patient_name}}!

Just a small reminder from {{clinic_name}} - it's time for your {{medicine_name}} {{timing}}.

Consistency makes such a difference. You're doing great - keep it up!
templates.notes: Morning medicine dose reminder. Requires medicine scheduling workflow before runtime use.

templates.message:
Hi {{patient_name}}, hope your day is going well!

A gentle reminder from {{clinic_name}} - please take your {{medicine_name}} {{timing}} today.

{{doctor_name}} is rooting for your recovery. You've got this!
templates.notes: Afternoon medicine dose reminder. Requires medicine scheduling workflow before runtime use.

templates.message:
Good evening {{patient_name}},

Time for your {{medicine_name}} {{timing}} - {{clinic_name}} checking in with your evening reminder.

Rest well tonight. {{clinic_name}} is with you every step of the way.
templates.notes: Evening medicine dose reminder. Requires medicine scheduling workflow before runtime use.

templates.message:
Hi {{patient_name}}, you've completed your full medicine course from {{doctor_name}}!

That takes real commitment - well done.

If you're feeling much better, that's wonderful news. If any symptoms linger or return, please visit the clinic for a review. We're always here to help.
templates.notes: Medicine course completion message. Requires course-end scheduling workflow before runtime use.

templates.message:
Hi {{patient_name}}, a warm reminder from {{clinic_name}}.

{{doctor_name}} is looking forward to seeing you tomorrow, {{follow_up_date}}, for your follow-up visit.

Your recovery really matters to us - please do try to come in. It'll be a quick and comfortable visit.
templates.notes: Day-before follow-up reminder. WF1 maps {{1}} patient, {{2}} clinic, {{3}} doctor, {{4}} formatted follow-up date.

templates.message:
Good morning {{patient_name}}!

Just a friendly reminder - your visit with {{doctor_name}} at {{clinic_name}} is today.

We're ready for you whenever you arrive. See you soon, take care on your way!
templates.notes: Same-day follow-up reminder. WF2 maps {{1}} patient, {{2}} doctor, {{3}} clinic.

templates.message:
Thank you, {{name}}! ✅ We've noted that you'll be coming in for your appointment. See you then!

If anything changes, feel free to message us.
templates.notes: Auto-reply sent within 24h session window (no template approval needed). Sent only when patient confirms.

templates.message:
Hi {{name}}, no problem at all! 😊 We've noted that you'd like to reschedule. A member of our team will reach out to you shortly to arrange a new time.

Thank you for letting us know!
templates.notes: Auto-reply for cancellations. Notifies patient that staff will follow up. Does NOT auto-schedule.
Sent to admin WhatsApp number only. Not patient-facing.

twilio_template_categories.UTILITY: Transactional care messages tied to an intake, queue event, prescription, reminder, or care plan.
twilio_template_categories.MARKETING: Re-engagement or promotional messages. Confirm opt-in and approval before production.
